seo.title: Contact — Auth Fly | Follow the build
seo.description: Auth Fly is in active PoC → MVP. Follow the build on GitHub and Telegram, install packages from npm, and report security issues via private advisories.
seo.keywords: Auth Fly contact, github.com/authfly, t.me/authfly, npmjs authfly, security advisories, self-hosted SSO support

sections.availability_title: What Auth Fly can help with

hero.title: Get in touch
hero.description: Auth Fly is in active development — PoC is live, MVP is in flight. Follow the build, file issues, or join the discussion.

channels.label: GitHub
channels.desc: Issues, discussions, releases, and private security advisories.

channels.label: Telegram
channels.desc: Public channel with build notes and roadmap updates.

channels.label: npm
channels.desc: Browser SDK packages — start with AuthKit TS.

availability: Self-hosted SSO (SAML 2.0 + OIDC) deployments on your own origin
Hanko-backed PoC integrations and migrations from third-party login UIs
Adaptive SDKs for new languages and frameworks
Hosted UI customisation with UI8Kit and embedded i18n
Security review against the public pre-flight checklist
note: Auth Fly is in PoC → MVP. Live demos will appear after MVP hardening — follow GitHub and Telegram for updates. Vulnerability reports: open a private security advisory at github.com/authfly.
